project_name: Your Digital Twin – AI-Powered Personal Assistant
project_owner: B.Sc. Data Science Final Year Student
goal: Build a backend system that acts as a personal digital assistant where each user can securely manage their own tasks using JWT-based authentication.

final_expected_system.description: A secure REST API backend where users can register, login, and manage their own tasks. Each user can only access their own data.

security.authorization: User-specific task access via token identity

login_flow: Password is verified using hash check
task_flow: User sends JWT token in header
User can only see tasks linked to their ID

remaining_work: Optional: Add simple frontend or documentation demo

exam_explanation_summary.root_404_reason: Project is API-only backend. No root route is defined intentionally.
exam_explanation_summary.security_explanation: JWT ensures only authenticated users can access their own data.
exam_explanation_summary.data_privacy_explanation: Tasks are filtered using user_id extracted from JWT token.
